title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Maersk India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Maersk India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Fleet Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!
